response.original_title: Fabulosul destin al lui Toma Cuzin
response.overview: Toma Cuzin was a genuine adventurer. He liked cigars flavored strawberries, old-fashioned charm hats and his favorite perfume was characters. Present at the festival "CineMaIubit" 2008 competition, Section fiction film.
response.tagline: The Fabulous Destiny of Toma Cuzin
response.title: Fabulosul destin al lui Toma Cuzin
